MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for Richard Martin. Brian McCaffrey for Douglas Campbell.

The Petition for Preliminary Distribution and the Petition for An Order Determining Interest in Certain Real Property, etc. were set for trial on February 7, 2014 and February 14, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 (two half day trials). Trial briefs, Motions in Limine, witness list and exhibit lists are due by February 3, 2014. Counsel are to confer by January 15, 2014 as to what Motions in Limine they might have.

Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Continued To Sep-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ed Koplowitz for Richard Martin. Brian McCaffrey for Douglas Campbell.

The Court inquired whether or not a settlement agreement had been reached. Mr. McCaffrey stated that he has been unable to reach his client to inform him of Mr. Koplowitz' counter-proposal. Mr. Koplowitz requested a thirty day continuance noting that the settlement has come down to one issue. Both matters were continued to September 24, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 at that time if a settlement has not been reached the Court will set the matters for trial.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee. (Not Reported)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian McCaffrey for Douglas Campbell. Edward Koplowitz for Richard Martin (Respondent).

Counsel agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than March 22, 2013. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by March 22, 2013. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on March 26, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation and trial setting.
